relations.note: Main is one of the three approved styles governed by the exclusivity rule.
Secondary/data is one of the three approved styles governed by the exclusivity rule.
Text-heavy is one of the three approved styles governed by the exclusivity rule.

effect.reserved_for: one style per screen/section — never two of the same style competing
effect.subject: callout_style

quotes: never two of the same style competing on one screen/section
three approved styles — use judiciously; never two of the same style competing on one screen/section

rules.intent: Prevent visually competing duplicate callout treatments within a single view.
rules.rule_text: There are three approved callout styles (Main, Secondary/data, Text-heavy); use them judiciously and never allow two of the same style to compete on one screen/section.

quotes: Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text
**Main callout (key point):** Bold **Brand Blue (#00529b)** text with **Gold (#ffc60a)** horizontal rules above and below. Centered text.
rule weight 2px, rule width ≈ 60–100% of text block, 16px padding between rule and text

rules.rule_text: Main callout (key point): Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text with Gold (#ffc60a) 2px horizontal rules above and below (callout.main.rule_weight = 2px), centered text, rule width ≈ 60–100% of the text block, and 16px padding between rule and text.

quotes: **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text
20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5

**Secondary/data callout:** **Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint** with **Bold Brand Blue** text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon). [GENERAL: 20px internal padding, corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.]

rules.rule_text: Secondary/data callout: Light Blue (#E6F0F9) box at 70% tint with Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) text; may include one line icon (e.g., 1x pill icon); 20px internal padding; corner radius per accent-shape rules §2.5.

quotes: **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**
24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile

**Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions):** **Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint**, **Bold Brand Blue headline**, line icons, **Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads**, **Regular Graphite (#212121) body text**. [GENERAL: 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.]

rules.rule_text: Text-heavy callout (lists/descriptions): Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) box at 30% tint, Bold Brand Blue (#00529b) headline, line icons, Bold Sky Blue (#358CCB) subheads, Regular Graphite (#212121) body text; 24px internal padding; two-column icon+text layout collapses to single column on mobile.
